inputs.name: session_url_path
inputs.description: Inferno will use this value to setup dedicated session-specific FHIR endpoints to use during these tests. If not provided a value will be generated.
inputs.title: Session-specific URL path extension

inputs.name: client_endpoint_access_token
inputs.description: The bearer token that Inferno will send on requests to the client under test's rest-hook notification endpoint.
inputs.title: Client Notification Access Token

inputs.name: approval_json_response
inputs.description: Response Bundle JSON for approved $submit requests, containing all Must Support elements.
inputs.title: Claim approved response JSON

inputs.name: denial_json_response
inputs.description: Response Bundle JSON for denied $submit requests, containing all Must Support elements.
inputs.title: Claim denied response JSON

inputs.name: pended_json_response
inputs.description: Response Bundle JSON for pended $submit requests, containing all Must Support elements.
inputs.title: Claim pended response JSON

inputs.name: inquire_json_response
inputs.description: Response Bundle JSON for $inquire requests, containing all Must Support elements.
inputs.title: Claim inquiry response JSON

inputs.name: ms_submit_responses
inputs.description: JSON array of response bundles for Must Support $submit testing. Contains all Must Support elements across all response profiles.
inputs.title: Must Support $submit Response Bundles

inputs.name: ms_inquire_responses
inputs.description: JSON array of response bundles for Must Support $inquire testing. Contains all Must Support elements across all response profiles.
inputs.title: Must Support $inquire Response Bundles
